> kind: tenantOverlay
> apiVersion: ruh.ai/v1alpha1
> metadata:
>  overlayId: ai-buildops.github-linear-slack-sentry

>  displayName: GitHub + Linear + Slack + Sentry overlay
>  owner: platform-solutions
>  environmentClass: production
>  version: 0.1.0
> trustBoundary:
>  key: product-prod-core
>  runtimeProfile: prod
>  gateway:
>  mode: dedicated
>  workspaceStrategy: service-per-workspace

>  mode: non-main
>  scope: agent
> services:
>  catalog:
>  - key: api
>  repo: github:acme/api
>  linearTeam: CORE
>  slackChannel: '#api-buildops'

>  - key: web
>  repo: github:acme/web
>  linearTeam: APP
>  slackChannel: '#web-buildops'
>  sentryProject: web-prod
> connectors:
>  github:
>  enabled: true
>  installationRef: secretref://connectors/github/app-prod
>  org: acme
>  protectedBranchPolicyRef: main-release-guardrails
>  linear:
>  enabled: true
>  installationRef: secretref://connectors/linear/app-prod
>  teamMap:
>  CORE: core-platform
>  APP: app-experience
>  slack:
>  enabled: true
>  installationRef: secretref://connectors/slack/app-prod
>  approvalChannel: '#eng-approvals'
>  alertChannel: '#eng-alerts'
>  sentry:
>  enabled: true
>  installationRef: secretref://connectors/sentry/app-prod
>  orgSlug: acme-observability
> roleMappings:
>  approvals:
>  releaseManager: group://release-managers
>  repoOwner: group://service-owners
>  oncallLead: group://oncall-leads
> policies:
>  actions:
>  createBranch:
>  default: auto_allowed
>  openPullRequest:
>  default: auto_allowed
>  mergeProtectedBranch:
>  default: human_only
>  deployProduction:
>  default: approval_required
>  postExternalIncidentMessage:
>  default: approval_required...
